title: Uruguayan Cheese Empanadas
description: A twist on traditional empanadas with a Uruguayan touch, featuring melted cheese and a crispy exterior.
instructions: Preheat the wok to medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
In a separate pan, scramble the egg and set aside.
Place a wonton wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the beef and cheese mixture in the center.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium heat and add a small amount of oil to coat the bottom.
Add the empanadas and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve the empanadas hot with the scrambled egg on top.
